nasb.text: ‘However, a firstborn among animals, which as a firstborn belongs to the Lord, no man may consecrate it; whether ox or sheep, it is the Lord’s.

esv.text: “But a firstborn of animals, which as a firstborn belongs to the Lord, no man may dedicate; whether ox or sheep, it is the Lord’s.

cnv.text: “唯獨牲畜的頭一胎，無論是牛或是羊，既然頭一胎是屬於耶和華的，人就不能再把牠分別為聖，因為這本是耶和華的。

ccb.text: “洁净牲畜的头胎，无论是牛是羊，已经属于耶和华，任何人不可再把它献给耶和华。
